tooltip.thermal_ability.type.tool.burn.d: Deals %1$s extra burn damage to the target, bypassing damage cooldown
tooltip.thermal_ability.type.tool.burn_n: Clears the target of powder snow and chill/freeze
tooltip.thermal_ability.type.tool.freeze: Deals %1$s extra ice damage to the target, bypassing damage cooldown
Causes powder snow effect on target for %1$s
Causes chill/freeze effect on target for %1$s
tooltip.thermal_ability.type.armor.provi: §4With full set: Allows use of Scorch Ground keybind
§4With full set: Allows use of Frost Walker keybind
tooltip.thermal_ability.type.armor.cause: §4With full set: Ignites attacker when attacked for %1$s
§4With full set: Causes powder snow effect on attacker when attacked for %1$s
§4With full set: Causes chill/freeze effect on attacker when attacked for %1$s
tooltip.thermal_ability.type.armor.negat: §4Extinguishes fire, clears powder snow and chill/freeze
tooltip.standard_ability.type.tool.0: On attack, causes these negative effects onto the target
tooltip.standard_ability.type.armor.0: Passively applies these positive (including negative if multiple) effects every 4s while supported armor is equipped
tooltip.standard_ability.type.armor.1: Some effects may be delayed in activation to trigger every 20s instead
tooltip.infused_ability.type.tool.0: On attack, causes these negative effects onto the target, and absorbs these positive effects from the target
tooltip.infused_ability.type.tool.1: Passively applies these positive (including negative if multiple) effects every (effect duration * 2) seconds when the item is held
tooltip.infused_ability.type.tool.2: Some effects may apply haste passively as a bonus, and others might drain the durability of the item when activated
tooltip.infused_ability.type.armor.0: When attacked, causes these negative effects onto the target
tooltip.infused_ability.type.armor.1: Passively applies these positive (including negative if multiple) effects every 4s while supported armor is equipped
tooltip.infused_ability.type.armor.2: Some effects may be delayed in activation to trigger every 20s instead, and might also trigger armor degradation every 10s
